THEWITCH-HEXBLAST.title: Hexblast
THEWITCH-HEXBLAST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each unique debuff on the enemy, then remove them.
THEWITCH-HEMLOCK.title: Hemlock
THEWITCH-CURSED_SPELLBOOK.title: Cursed Spellbook
THEWITCH-CURSED_SPELLBOOK.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 fewer card and gain {Energy:diff()} extra [gold]Energy[/gold].
THEWITCH-REFUSE_PILE.title: Refuse Pile
THEWITCH-REFUSE_PILE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add {Cards} [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scavenge+|Scavenge}[/gold] into both your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
THEWITCH-HASTY_BREW.title: Hasty Brew
THEWITCH-TINDER.title: Tinder
THEWITCH-GRIND_DOWN.title: Grind Down
THEWITCH-GRIND_DOWN.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
Turn it into a [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWITCH-FEAST_WITH_WOLVES.title: Feast With Wolves
THEWITCH-FEAST_WITH_WOLVES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw until you draw an [gold]Attack[/gold] card.
THEWITCH-DISTILL.title: Distill
THEWITCH-OXIDIZERS.title: Oxidizers
THEWITCH-OXIDIZERS.description: The next [gold]Potion[/gold] you play this turn is played again.
THEWITCH-EXTRACT_ESSENCE.title: Extract Essence
THEWITCH-EXTRACT_ESSENCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
On unblocked damage, extract a [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWITCH-STRIKE_WITCH.title: Strike
THEWITCH-DEFEND_WITCH.title: Defend
THEWITCH-OWL_FAMILIAR.title: Owl Familiar
THEWITCH-WISDOM.title: Wisdom
THEWITCH-STONY_BREW.title: Stony Brew
THEWITCH-CAT_FAMILIAR.title: Cat Familiar
THEWITCH-FEROCITY.title: Ferocity
THEWITCH-FERTILIZE.title: Fertilize
THEWITCH-LAVENDER_AND_SAGE.title: Lavender and Sage
THEWITCH-READ_THE_BONES.title: Read the Bones
THEWITCH-LICH_POWDER.title: Lich Powder
THEWITCH-WICKER_FORM.title: Wicker Form
THEWITCH-WICKER_FORM.description: If you would create a card or [gold]Potion[/gold], instead create [gold]Rake[/gold].
THEWITCH-RAKE.title: Rake
THEWITCH-RIP_SOUL.title: Rip Soul
THEWITCH-CATALYST.title: Catalyst
THEWITCH-CALL_THE_PACK.title: Call the Pack
THEWITCH-CALL_THE_PACK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle {Cards:diff()} [gold]Gnash[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEWITCH-NETTLES.title: Nettles
THEWITCH-NETTLES.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Bramble[/gold].
THEWITCH-BRAMBLEBURST.title: Brambleburst
THEWITCH-BRAMBLEBURST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Bramble[/gold], then lose all [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWITCH-WILD_GROWTH.title: Wild Growth
THEWITCH-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.title: Forbidden Magic
THEWITCH-BONFIRE.title: Bonfire
THEWITCH-BONFIRE.description: When possible, spend {BonfirePower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold] to play cards instead of [gold]Energy[/gold].
THEWITCH-POLYMORPH.title: Polymorph
THEWITCH-POLYMORPH.description:
Choose a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
It becomes a random [gold]Familiar[/gold].
THEWITCH-POLYMORPH.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to [gold]Polymorph[/gold] into a [gold]Familiar[/gold]
THEWITCH-SALT_AND_ASH.title: Salt and Ash
THEWITCH-SALT_AND_ASH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {BonusBlock:diff()} more [gold]Block[/gold] if you have a debuff.
THEWITCH-THIRST.title: Thirst
THEWITCH-THIRST.description: Whenever you draw a card, gain {ThirstPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEWITCH-STRIKE_FEAR.title: Strike Fear
THEWITCH-NEEDLE_WHIP.title: Needle Whip
THEWITCH-TASTE_OF_BLOOD.title: Taste of Blood
THEWITCH-DEEP_ROOTS.title: Deep Roots
THEWITCH-DEEP_ROOTS.description: At the start of your turn, gain {DeepRootsPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWITCH-HIDE_IN_A_BUSH.title: Hide in a Bush
THEWITCH-STUCK_IN_A_BUSH.title: Stuck in a Bush
THEWITCH-WICKED_BREW.title: Wicked Brew
THEWITCH-HERBAL_BREW.title: Herbal Brew
THEWITCH-RATTLING_BOTTLES.title: Rattling Bottles
THEWITCH-RATTLING_BOTTLES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Fill your empty potion slots with [gold]Rocks[/gold].
THEWITCH-BAG_OF_TEETH.title: Bag of Teeth
THEWITCH-HIDDEN_IN_SMOKE.title: Hidden in Smoke
THEWITCH-HIDDEN_IN_SMOKE.description: At the start of your turn, create a [gold]Vial of Smoke[/gold].
THEWITCH-BRAMBLE_SHIELD.title: Bramble Shield
THEWITCH-MULCH.title: Mulch
THEWITCH-MULCH.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {BramblesPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
THEWITCH-HEDGE_PRISON.title: Hedge Prison
THEWITCH-ROTTING_ROOTS.title: Rotting Roots
THEWITCH-ROTTING_ROOTS.description: At the start of your turn, ALL enemies lose {RottingRootsPower:diff()} HP and you heal 1 HP.
THEWITCH-BIND_IN_BLOOD.title: Bind in Blood
THEWITCH-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.title: Bottomless Cauldron
THEWITCH-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.description: Whenever you use a [gold]Potion[/gold], create a [gold]Noxious Brew[/gold].
THEWITCH-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.title: Cloak of Moonlight
THEWITCH-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.description: Whenever you create a card or [gold]Potion[/gold], gain {CloakOfMoonlightPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEWITCH-BOTTLE_WALL.title: Bottle Wall
THEWITCH-UNSTABLE_REACTION.title: Unstable Reaction
THEWITCH-UNSTABLE_REACTION.description:
Destroy all of your [gold]Potions[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each.
THEWITCH-DANCE_AROUND_THE_CAULDRON.title: Dance Around the Cauldron
THEWITCH-DANCE_AROUND_THE_CAULDRON.descr: Whenever you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] this turn, draw a card.
THEWITCH-ROOMY_SATCHEL.title: Roomy Satchel
THEWITCH-ROOMY_SATCHEL.description: Gain {Slots:diff()} potion slots until the end of combat.
THEWITCH-PLAGUE.title: Plague
THEWITCH-NIMBLE.title: Nimble
THEWITCH-KNOWLEDGE.title: Knowledge
THEWITCH-KNOWLEDGE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgrade[/gold] ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] for the rest of combat.|[gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] for the rest of combat.}
THEWITCH-WORMY.title: Wormy
THEWITCH-HIBERNATE.title: Hibernate
THEWITCH-MUTILATE.title: Mutilate
THEWITCH-SCOUT_WEAKNESS.title: Scout Weakness
THEWITCH-CLAW_EYES.title: Claw Eyes
THEWITCH-SHINY.title: Shiny!
THEWITCH-SCAVENGE.title: Scavenge
THEWITCH-RAT_FAMILIAR.title: Rat Familiar
THEWITCH-BEAR_FAMILIAR.title: Bear Familiar
THEWITCH-CROW_FAMILIAR.title: Crow Familiar
THEWITCH-POCKET_RATS.title: Pocket Rats
THEWITCH-BROOM_STRIKE.title: Broom Strike
THEWITCH-BROOM_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play a random [gold]Skill[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEWITCH-EXPERIMENT.title: Experiment
THEWITCH-EXPERIMENT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Discard a random [gold]Potion[/gold], then create a random [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWITCH-EXTRACT_LIFE.title: Extract Life
THEWITCH-EXTRACT_LIFE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
A random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()} and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
THEWITCH-PILLAGE.title: Pillage
THEWITCH-PILLAGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw a card for each of your [gold]Familiars[/gold].
THEWITCH-STAMPEDE.title: Stampede
THEWITCH-STAMPEDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal {FamiliarDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each of your [gold]Familiars[/gold].
THEWITCH-RITUAL_SACRIFICE.title: Ritual Sacrifice
THEWITCH-RITUAL_SACRIFICE.description:
Sacrifice a [gold]Familiar[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
THEWITCH-GNASH.title: Gnash
THEWITCH-GNASH.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Gnash[/gold] played this combat.
THEWITCH-WOLF_FAMILIAR.title: Wolf Familiar
THEWITCH-WEATHERED_WITCH_HAT.title: Weathered Witch Hat
THEWITCH-WEATHERED_WITCH_HAT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next [gold]Skill[/gold] you play costs 1 less.
THEWITCH-WOE_AND_WHIMSY.title: Woe and Whimsy
THEWITCH-FIND_FAMILIAR.title: Find Familiar
THEWITCH-FIND_FAMILIAR.description: Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Familiar[/gold] {Cards:plural:power|powers} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-PACT_OF_BEASTS.title: Pact of Beasts
THEWITCH-PACT_OF_BEASTS.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Put ALL [gold]Familiar[/gold] cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-EMBRACE_THE_WILDS.title: Embrace the Wilds
THEWITCH-EMBRACE_THE_WILDS.description:
[gold]Summon[/gold] {Familiars:diff()} random [gold]Familiars[/gold].
Draw {DrawReduction} fewer cards at the start of each turn.
THEWITCH-CIRCLE_OF_ROT.title: Circle of Rot
THEWITCH-CIRCLE_OF_ROT.description:
You and your allies gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEWITCH-CREEPING_VINES.title: Creeping Vines
THEWITCH-SHARE_THE_BREW.title: Share the Brew
THEWITCH-SHARE_THE_BREW.description: You and your allies each gain a random [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWITCH-BOTTLE_BARRAGE.title: Bottle Barrage
THEWITCH-BOTTLE_BARRAGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Potion[/gold] created this combat.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
THEWITCH-GATHER_HERBS.title: Gather Herbs
THEWITCH-DOUBLE_DOUBLE.title: Double, Double
THEWITCH-DOUBLE_DOUBLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Give a random card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay}.
THEWITCH-AMBUSH.title: Ambush!
THEWITCH-AMBUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Create a random [gold]Familiar[/gold] card.
THEWITCH-A_LITTLE_SIP.title: A Little Sip
THEWITCH-A_LITTLE_SIP.description: Whenever you use a [gold]Potion[/gold], heal {ALittleSipPower:diff()} HP.
THEWITCH-PACT_OF_AGONY.title: Pact of Agony
THEWITCH-PACT_OF_AGONY.description:
Add {Cards} [gold]{Cards:plural:Wound|Wounds}[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
THEWITCH-PACT_OF_FURY.title: Pact of Fury
THEWITCH-LIGHT_THE_CANDLE.title: Light the Candle
THEWITCH-LIGHT_THE_CANDLE.description:
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Create a [gold]Vial of Smoke[/gold].
THEWITCH-WITCHCRAFT.title: Witchcraft
THEWITCH-WITCHCRAFT.description: Pour all of your [gold]Potions[/gold] into [gold]The Cauldron[/gold].
THEWITCH-WAX_AND_WANE.title: Wax and Wane
THEWITCH-VEXING_STRIKE.title: Vexing Strike
THEWITCH-BEWITCHING_GRIN.title: Bewitching Grin
THEWITCH-SOUL_KNOT.title: Soul Knot
THEWITCH-SOUL_KNOT.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, apply it to ALL enemies.
THEWITCH-BROKEN_PACT.title: Broken Pact
THEWITCH-PRICES_PAID.title: Prices Paid
